original_hypothesis.title: Unbounded Referral Fee Setting Allows Fee Manager to Divert 100% of Swap Fees or DoS All Swaps
original_hypothesis.hypothesis_description: PairFactory.setReferralFee and setCustomReferralFee have no upper bound check. Setting MAX_REFERRAL_FEE > 10000 causes _referralFee = amount * maxRef / 10000 > amount in Pair._update0/_update1, causing `amount -= _referralFee` to underflow (revert in Solidity 0.8.13). This permanently DoSes all swaps on all pairs. Even values near 10000 divert nearly all fees from LPs.
original_hypothesis.investigation_rationale: setFee has MAX_FEE cap but setReferralFee has none. The referral fee is computed as a percentage of the already-calculated swap fee. Values > 10000 cause arithmetic underflow in _update0/_update1, breaking all swaps.

proof_of_signal.pattern: setReferralFee has no upper bound validation; amount -= _referralFee underflows if fee > 10000

initial_economic_evidence.suspicious_calculation: _referralFee = amount * maxRef / 10000; if maxRef > 10000, _referralFee > amount, causing underflow
initial_economic_evidence.manipulation_vector: Compromised feeManager sets referral fee to 10001+, permanently DoSing all swaps
initial_economic_evidence.profit_hypothesis: Complete protocol DoS; or at 9999, diverts 99.99% of fees from LPs

economic_questions: What is the current MAX_REFERRAL_FEE value?
Is feeManager a multisig or EOA?
What is the total daily swap fee volume at risk?
validation_requirements: Set referral fee to 10001 and verify swap revert
Calculate LP fee loss at various referral fee values near 10000

preliminary_attack_economics.potential_profit_range: Protocol-wide DoS or complete fee diversion
preliminary_attack_economics.estimated_profit_margin: Complete if fee diversion; destructive if DoS

market_conditions_analysis.market_impact_assessment: Total protocol shutdown or LP fee theft

potential_victim_impact.direct_victims: All users (DoS) or all LPs (fee diversion)
potential_victim_impact.estimated_impact_per_user: Complete loss of trading ability or fee income
potential_victim_impact.total_value_at_risk: Entire protocol TVL and fee flow

validation_result.impact_summary: Filtered before validation: attack_realism is LOW
validation_result.detailed_analysis: This hypothesis was auto-rejected because its attack_realism grade is LOW. Preconditions require actions outside the attacker's control (off-chain compromise, victim cooperation, or admin collusion). No LLM validation was performed.
